description_long: This chair features a mid-century modern design with a gently curved backrest and integrated armrests, all upholstered in a blue patterned fabric. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and support, while the fabric displays a subtle geometric woven pattern. The outer shell and legs are crafted from a warm, natural wood, with the wood grain clearly visible and smoothly finished. The chair stands on four slightly splayed wooden legs, connected by cross-bracing for added stability. The back of the chair is fully enclosed in wood, contrasting with the soft, textured fabric on the front-facing surfaces. This combination of materials and ergonomic form makes it suitable for stylish urban interiors such as cafes, waiting areas, or modern offices.
description: A mid-century modern chair with a blue patterned fabric seat and backrest, set in a smooth wooden frame with four splayed legs. The design features integrated armrests and a fully enclosed wooden back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue patterned fabric seat and backrest, with integrated armrests and wooden legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's curved profile, the thickness of the padding, and the smooth transition from fabric to wood.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully wooden back shell and the cross-braced wooden legs, with no fabric visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ergonomic curve and the blend of wood and fabric.
